reviews.text: Josh Bentley has been my personal attorney for years now and I can’t express how professional and kind this man is. You need help, go here.
Mr. Bentley and his team treated me very well in a difficult situation. It was great to his entire office on my side. I would have Joshua represent me in any future matters needing a lawyer.

My husband and I reached out to James for some legal advice and we got a call back within hours. We received an open ear and sound advice. He was also able to help us get clarity on a criminal case from long ago, which was an unexpected surprise. He didn’t charge us even though we offered. I needed a lawyer for a friend who has a DUI and was getting the run around how to get this matter taking care of and his license restored.  The Law Or of James Dunn and Robert Preskill went out of there way to help me.  I was not a client of this firm but they still helped me.  If your looking for a honest caring law firm I highly recommend this office,
Fantastic law firm. Friendly, helpful, and very knowledgeable about the intricacies of the San Mateo courts. Extremely satisfied with their services and outcome!

Robert  Preskill of the James Dunn law firm Is unlike any attorney I have ever dealt with before Not only is he professional but unbelievably attentive to every detail of my case most attorneys I've ever dealt with has been for less than 5 minutes right before we go into the court Mr. Pre skill met me on a Saturday and spent over an hour asking many questions to find out every single detail of How I found myself been in need of his services  he was very honest in his opinion of what he thought our success  Would be he spent a lot of his time in investigating my case. I ended up not needing in the services of the law firm and to my Surprise this law firm returned every single penny of the money I paid for this case unheard of This law firm truly cares about this community us as people and doesn't just look at us as dollar signs they truly care Thank you Robert pre skill and James Dunn you truly are a rare breed of attorney
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the excellent review, Frank! Glad to have met your expectations for great service that our firm prides itself on. Again, thank you for the kind words!

reviews.text: Good lawyers

Jim is a colleague of mine, as I am also an attorney. He assisted me on a legal matter involving a school with upmost kindness and compassion. I was highly stressed by the matter and contacted Jim several times, even after work hours. He made himself available and was completely professional and compassionate through the representation. He has a heavy case load because he does excellent work.
This firm will give you the best legal defense in town.  If you are even slightly considering going with these guys,  just do it.
This firm is supposed to be the best in the peninsula, and they did not disappoint. I highly recommend them.

Mr. James Dunn was very helpful. Even if most of the time we harrased him constantly because we just didn't understand the court procedures. We had never had anything like that happen to our family. He was very patient and provided a private investigator so that the case would be dismissed. The case was finally dismissed and we are very grateful for his hard work. Even when we showed lack of confidence in his abilities at times he continued to give us the best advice and he never gave up on us. He always treated us with respect and explained to the best of his ability what was happening. We are very grateful for his expertise in law and would definitely recommend him to others in similar situations.

Mr. Dunn has always gone above and beyond to help me out. He is an extremely hard worker and will do whatever it takes to take care of his clients. Not sure what I would of done in numerous occasions without Mr. Dunn's help. I will continue to be in contact with Mr. Dunn, because I know that he is an honest, compassionate, and determined individual that prides himself on helping others. Do yourself a favor and trust in James Dunn.

I was in desperate need for a qualified attorney who would represent me professionally and justly. In James Dunn I received outstanding representation and guidance throughout the entire process of my case. I highly recommend his services to anyone who is in search for a competent lawyer who will fight for you 100% - plus!

Well, I had hired a lawyer for my DUI prior to finding Jim Dunn, so I have something to compare too. My previous lawyer was Mark Blair, recommended by a friend. Mark had a 6 page paper explaining why he deserved a $2000 retainer and why that was him being lenient. Mark came to court, stood in front of the judge, said his name, and the judge made a ruling and Mark wasn't even sure what it was. Mark was not personable, you always had to go through his secretaries, and it felt like we had to chase him down. We felt he didn't earn his money and I even went to jail anyway because of some honest miscommunications with with court that Mark was supposed to handle but didn't.
So after being forced out of my house early on a Saturday morning and thrown in jail, my girlfriend was able to get a hold of Jim Dunn, who not only visited me in jail on a Sunday evening, but took care of the paperwork to get me transferred to him while getting a court date that next Monday. He also didn't even need the retainer before he started working on my case. Jim had to fix a very complex situation due to some honest misunderstandings and injury's preventing my participation in my WWP.
Jim understands the law very well, he put it in terms I could understand, never lied about anything, and was able to get me the best possible ruling from the courts. He called me, actually called me several times check in and make sure everything was ok and that I was doing my homework to get free of this horrible, unorganized entity we call the justice system. There is so much more to this story, and there are so many more small things Jim did that made my previous lawyer seem more like a fraud.
If you ever get tangled in the many dangling strings of the law, you want Jim Dunn on your side. He is smart, educated, authentic, and hard working to say the very least and I'm glad to know him and have hired him.

I was a client of Mr. Dunn's and charged with a DUI. It was a very difficult time in my life and I was hoping that I would be able to find an attorney who would fight hard on my behalf. Instead of spending a single day in jail, I was able to get probation and community service. After a year of probation everything was settled and I was able to move on with my life. I recommend Mr. Dunn with full integrity and faith. If you are in trouble with the law, give him a call. His experience will guide you when you need it the most. Goodluck!

my experience with the law firm of Marvin Firestone, MD*JD & Associates, LLP was very good it was a long process, and it took several years to complete, but through the entire process I never felt alone. Michael was my main contact along with the office staff and I was kept informed often. The knowledge of everyone in the office was very strong, anytime I had questions they had the answers. There were many occasions I spoke with Michael just to calm down and he was always there to do that, not knowing how things would turn out from the very beginning I had extreme faith in Michael and Dr. Firestone, and the entire office staff. Thank You all very much for all the time and effort you put into my case I'm extremely happy with the results. I would highly recommend the firm of Dr. Firestone MD. JD& Associates,LLP
Can share goals,expectations & efficiiecy.with goal ofin6 e gratinh
EXCELLENT!  Powerhouse attorney who is a skilled litigator, very knowledgeable, personable and very professional.  I could not have been any better represented.  You cannot go wrong with Firestone!

Well-connected & with good motives but very DIFFICULT to work with & OVER-BILLS repeatedly & very SLOPPY & with ERRORS galore (even on a key final settlement letter to my Judge)…thank goodness my mom was an English teacher who taught me to review all & edit as a kid.  He did his best on an already nearly done deal, but clearly his 85 or so years is showing.  Younger Docs now suddenly on his webpage?  A bad sign.  Sad, as he IS the firm, it will likely IMPLODE without him.  Tells jokes & stories & CHARGES you $650./hr for them as well…omg!  He & his billing have to be supervised closely.

He can be mean & spiteful & gets offended so easily, a sign of a fragile ego & narcissist.  Look around.  Caveat emptor, let the buyer BEWARE.

Marvin and Michael Firestone helped with some medical license problems in the state of California. They are very familiar with medical license regulations and medical board conflicts. I would strongly recommend them to other health care professionals who need help dealing with the California Medical Board. Thank you Firestone Law Firm for all your help! Sincerely, -Abraham

Michael Firestone and his staff, Jody and Pat were fantastic!! They were very professional, responsive, knowledgeable, thorough, and successful in getting a fair settlement on my behalf. I highly recommend them!

Thank you for everything you are the best

You Always treat us as a family and care about case thank you
I know my case finish but I will tell everyone about you thank you Michael
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you.  It was a privilege working with you and your family.

reviews.text: I definitely would recommend Michael A. Firestone to everyone I know!  Michael is very knowledgeable about medical law.  I reached out to Michael regarding my situation at the lowest point of my life, and Michael did not hesitate to learn about my case and helped me with my appeal process.  Michael dedicated time and wrote one of the greatest and amazing appeal papers that is like a book.  Also, Michael prepared very well for the hearing with fantastic questions.  Michael is not only a great lawyer but also a kind hearted person!  He cares for me as a person and always quickly responds to any questions or concerns I have during the most difficult time of my life.  Due to Michael’s dedication and hard work on my case, I prevailed in the appeal and have the opportunity to return to the residency program to complete training.  In addition, Michael helped me successfully obtain my California postgraduate training license to resume training.  I am so thankful and grateful to Michael, Dr. Firestone, and the staff at their law firm for being there for me when I needed help most.
Mr Firestone did an outstanding job representing us, answering questions promptly and most of all confidently ensuring our success in the matter. Highly recommended.

Dr. Firestone is a very professional, personable and knows his stuff.
I highly recommend him, especially with the Medical Board issues.

Great attorney, great person. Helped me in 1992 with some medical legal issues and I've talked about him and how grateful I am to him many time since then.

One of his great thoughts he taught me was to never tell someone "I know how you feel" because unless you have experienced the same exact situation, which is very unlikely, people are offended by someone saying that to them.

reviews.text: Vivian is a walking family law textbook, but most importantly Vivian is a lawyer with a heart.

As an Ivy League professor running into issues with seeking old records, Joe Zoucha was absolutely amazing. He immediately dropped everything else and went above and beyond to figure out and fix my problem.  He treated my problem exactly like it was his own, but doing a much better job than I had been able to do on my own. I am super grateful to him both for his conscientious service facilitating my divorce 15 years ago and then, when I called out of the blue, his focused attention to my unexpected problem locating my records years later.  He has always been incredibly responsive and extremely skilled.  You cannot go wrong hiring Joe to help you with any of your legal issues.

Joseph R. Zoucha is truly a lifesaver. Getting into a divorce is so difficult, and going up against someone who doesn't follow the law and is high-conflict is incredibly stressful. Joe knew exactly what to do every step of the way. He helped me fight someone who owned a business and refused to disclose it. In the end, we won the case, and the other party was ordered to pay my attorney's fees.

Joe also helped me prepare for a deposition, which I was so nervous about. He made sure I felt confident and ready, and that support made a huge difference.

What stood out the most is that Joe truly cares more about his clients than the money, he always had my best interest at heart. He is smart, experienced, and knows the law inside and out. Thank you, Joe, I will recommend you to everybody.

Working with Joseph Zoucha was the best decision I could have made. From day one, he took my case seriously and fought tirelessly on my behalf. Even though the police report put me at 100% fault and the insurance company refused to pay anything, Joe never gave up.

He was determined, strategic, and unafraid to stand up to the insurance company when it mattered most. Thanks to his hard work and expertise, I achieved a result I never thought possible. If you need a personal injury lawyer who will go the extra mile for you, I highly recommend Joseph Zoucha.
Directed me in the correct legal way to have my issues addressed, without any hesitation or advantage or prejudice. Will definitely have his office contact for future litigation. Thanks again

Joseph Zoucha is truly an outstanding attorney. I retained him for a case that he won for me in court, and he handled it with incredible competence, efficiency, and care. From start to finish, I felt well-advised, clearly informed, and completely taken care of.

What sets Joseph apart is not just his legal skill, but his deep familiarity with the courts—he knows the system inside and out, and it shows in how confidently and strategically he works. His energy, empathy, and responsiveness (by phone, text, and email) made a stressful situation feel manageable and even empowering.

He’s the kind of lawyer you want in your corner: sharp, grounded, and genuinely invested in your outcome. I recommend Joseph with top marks and full enthusiasm, without hesitation. If you want someone who truly knows what he's doing and will fight for you with clarity and heart—he’s the one.

I reached out to Mr. Zoucha because I was in need of legal advice regarding a potential custody and visitation dispute.  Mr. Zoucha was very quick to respond and schedule an initial consultation during which he was very thorough in getting the background facts, patiently talked through the issues and answered many questions.  He helped me identify that I also needed legal help in a different practice area and helped connect me with an attorney regarding an unlawful detainer case.  After the completion of that matter, I had several follow up communications with Mr. Zoucha about the custody and visitation dispute and he did not charge me for that work.  I appreciated his quick responses, his integrity and honesty, and the empathy with which he treats his clients.

I cannot speak highly enough of Joe Zoucha. Joe was instrumental in protecting my children and me from a truly horrific situation. He was not only incredibly professional and knowledgeable but also genuinely caring and supportive. He treated me like family and went above and beyond to ensure our safety and well-being. I am eternally grateful for his dedication and expertise. If you're seeking a family law attorney who will fight tirelessly for you, I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Zoucha.

Let me begin with this. Joe is a consummate professional. Life can be extremely tumultuous and navigating its changeless can be a
daunting task especially as it relates to family court matters. I found Joe on google and read through the reviews and his website and was very impressed with his qualifications. Particularly the fact that one of the great Califorina Supreme Court justices was under his Tutelage and that he Joe served as a judge. I was first introduced to Joe right before Thanksgiving. He was heading out of town to visit his family and he made the time to take my phone call. He was very empathetic and genuinely concerned for my situation. He stated that he wanted to help me and that he would contact me in couple of days once he was settled in on his vacation. Two days later on a
Sunday Joe called. His legal analysis and genuine compassion is something that you don’t see very often in today’s world. He has keen understanding of the nuances of California family judicial system. His 30 plus years of experience is invaluable. I would implore anyone who is reading this review to  stop what you are doing and call Joe. If you need an Attorney  concerning  family matters I would highly recommend Joe Zoucha he  is awesome.

If you want 100% honesty I would go with Joseph. You are actually feeling and concluding he is an honest lawyer and he listens to the the facts, numbers and dates, and he comes with the best course of action for you! I will recommend him 100%, is a safe investment of your time and resources.

I work in an office building in which there are several attorneys. My spouse and I had a serious legal matter. The attorneys in the building highly recommended Joseph Zoucha because he will go to court for his clients and manages hearings with a great deal of success. He is extremely reasonable with his fees, in addition to being very energetic about his work and helping his clients.  We are very happy we hired him to solve our case.  Joe clearly cared about us and worked diligently to help us in every possible way, with unbelievably fantastic results. He always thoroughly explained the law and how it worked for us. He is honest with the work he does. Joseph gave good accurate legal advice to us, and by the way, it turns out he is also a very nice guy.  If you need a lawyer you should contact this guy!

Joseph has no time for his clients, he takes several weeks to respond, and let’s you know that “it’s not the end of the world that your case is delayed, because he has other cases that take priority.” He reminds you that the price he charged is Pennie’s compared to what others would have charged and expects you to wait until he gets to you. I don’t know that Joseph knows what professionalism is as his tone in emails is snappish.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Maria - We don't seem to have a record of you ever being a client.

reviews.text:
Updated review:
Joe has advised me on numerous issues (personal injury, premises liability, employment, auto/ motor vehicle accident, damaged property over the last 7+ years, and he has been absolutely above and beyond professional, responsive, effective, helpful, and kind.
Whenever I hear of family, friends, or clients who have been injured, I always confidently give them Joe’s information because I know they are in good hands with him. He’s very straightforward. If he can help, he will. He gives sound advice and is very efficient and thorough about knowing what to do in various situations and proactively handling the important issues.
After 7+ years of working with him on various issues, I extremely highly  recommend Joe.

Original review:
A well-reviewed attorney in Palo Alto referred me to Joe & spoke very highly of him, saying he consistently takes on challenging cases & has a long track record of success with such cases, especially in personal injury & family law. There are a lot of attorneys in the bay area, & it was clear that other attorneys recognize his legal abilities & respect him.   I was injured & was getting the run-around & being treated very unprofessionally FOR MONTHS by the company (& their insurance company) that was responsible for my injury.  Once I began working with Joe, their demeanor changed IMMEDIATELY. He helped me with my personal injury case... because of him, I got EXTREMELY FAVORABLE RESULTS... & FAST. I was very impressed.   Joe is very effective, knowledgeable, & efficient. He is an experienced trial lawyer and has taken many cases to jury verdicts. He offers practical & straightforward advice that was extremely helpful to me, & he took the time to meet with me on several Saturdays. He was entirely professional - patiently & thoroughly explained things I did not understand & comprehensively answered all questions/ concerns I had. I would most definitely use him again for any of my legal needs, & I HIGHLY RECOMMEND him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for your honest feedback, Elle!

Exceptional Legal Expertise and Unwavering Dedication

I had the privilege of working with Silveira Law on a complex legal matter, and I cannot express enough gratitude for their exceptional service and dedication. From our initial consultation to the resolution of my case, Micheal demonstrated an unparalleled level of professionalism, expertise, and care.

Mike was incredibly thorough in analyzing my case, identifying potential challenges, and developing a tailored strategy to achieve the best possible outcome. Their ability to break down complex legal concepts into simple, understandable terms made me feel confident and informed throughout the process.

I was always kept up to date on the progress of my case, and promptly responded to my emails and phone calls. They never left me in the dark, ensuring that I felt supported every step of the way. It was clear that my case was genuinely cared about, and my concerns were met with the time to address them with patience and empathy.

If your case involves litigation, you want Silveira Law on your side. Their ability to present arguments persuasively and their composure under pressure were truly remarkable. Their preparation, confidence, and command of the facts gave me an undeniable advantage.

What sets Silveira Law apart is their genuine passion for helping their clients. They went above and beyond to ensure I felt empowered and informed, even providing resources and advice to help me navigate the aftermath of my case. Their dedication to achieving the best outcome was evident in every aspect of their work.

Thanks to Micheal’s hard work, my case resulted in a favorable outcome that exceeded my expectations. They were honest about potential risks from the start but never wavered in their commitment to advocating for me.

I wholeheartedly recommend Silveira Law to anyone seeking legal representation. Their expertise, professionalism, and genuine care for their clients make them a standout in their field. If you’re looking for a lawyer who will fight tirelessly on your behalf while keeping your best interests at heart, look no further than Silveira Law.

Thanks again Mike for your outstanding service—I am forever grateful!

I cannot thank this law firm enough for the outstanding service they provided. Thanks to their expertise, my charges were significantly dropped to a minor charge, which was a huge weight off my shoulders. My attorney, Mike Silveira, truly went above and beyond by attending multiple court dates on my behalf, sparing me the stress and inconvenience of having to be there. Throughout the entire process, he was incredibly courteous, professional and extremely patient with all my questions. I truly felt like I was in capable hands the entire time. I highly recommend this firm to anyone seeking legal representation. If I ever need legal help again (though I hope I don’t!), I wouldn’t hesitate to hire them again. Extremely satisfied with the outcome, and yes, I’m a real person with a genuine experience!

DUI case dismissed! I had a DUI in San Mateo and Mike got it dismissed within a year. With Mike, the court process was very strightfoward during this stressful time. My appearance in court was not nessacary during the case. I have even reccomended Mike to my friends.

Wow! When you're dealing with the court system, you're at the mercy of their judgement - at least, that's what I thought before working with Silveira Law! The responsiveness, consideration and overall representation was second to none and you're working with a true expert in the field.

Mike - thank you so much for working for my best interests and giving me clear insight on how the process will work. Visibility alleviates so much of the stress carried when fighting a case.

I'd recommend him to my mother! Thank you again!

I want to express my most sincere thank you for the most professional representation in Silveira Law firm. He stuck by me through this very stressful case that would have tarnished my future career had I not seeked the services of Mr. Silveira. I admire his work ethic and most of all excellent representation to give me the outcome I was hoping for, which was for a DUI that was reduced to a wet reckless with no jail time, no fine and a short probation period and guided me through each and every step in my court case. I cannot thank Mike Silveira enough for all of his hard work and time he took to represent me!

I was involved in a domestic dispute, and the police were trying to make it a much bigger deal than it really was.  My partner didn't even want to press charges, but I got arrested anyway.  You can never fully trust the "justice" system - my record was clean, and I wanted to keep it that way.  After speaking to a few criminal defense lawyers, I made the wise decision to retain Silveira Law.  They were on point with their legal advice and strategy.  WIth Silveira Law's help, my record is still clean and I have moved on with my life.  Silveira Law is experienced, smart, tough and extremely familiar with the criminal "justice" system and how it functions.  I highly recommended their services for criminal defense cases.

Silveira Law obtained the best possible outcome for my case.  From when we first spoke, it was clear that Mr. Silveira was extremely knowledgeable about the local court system, and all the players involved.  They diligently handled my case, kept me in the loop, and were able to obtain placement for me in a diversion program which led to the case being dismissed.  I didn't even have to go to court once. High quality criminal lawyer, highly recommended.

The police stopped me in San Mateo County resulting in an illegal search and seizure. The incident threatened serious prison time and the private defender the court first assigned to me was trying to sell me down the river by accepting a deal I did not want to take. The BEST decision I made was calling Mike Silveira. Not only were his prices fair and reasonable but his personality and demeanor were the model for how an attorney should relate to their client. He was non-pretentious, genuine and made me feel like I actually had someone fighting in my corner. Another important factor was that he provided evidence for me to review like body-worn camera footage and officer testimony transcripts that the private defender never offered. Mike was proactive in filing a motion to suppress so thoroughly crafted that the DA ended up throwing out the charges days before the hearing. Needless to say, Mike and his team saved my skin and made it possible for me to continue to take care of my sick mother. And you just can't put a price on that kind of help. Heaven sent for sure. God bless Mike and his team!

I had a DUI from years ago holding up my career, and Michael Silveira, Brian Heffern, and the Silveira team helped me out and expunged my record. Brian was amazing with communication updating me along the way and assuring me the team was doing everything they could to get our appeal approved. There was a pivot during the appeal, and Mike contacted me right away and we’re able to make the judge happy. I recommend this law team to the highest degree, very professional, organized, and great at communicating!
Highly responsive!! No hidden fees, and very responsible!! I had 3 violations on my ticket dismissed!! I promise you won’t regret it!

Jessica is professional, knowledgeable, responsive, and incredibly thorough. She takes the time to explain everything, answers questions without making you feel rushed, and makes sure you feel supported every step of the way. You can tell she puts her heart into her work and fights hard for her clients.

Hands down, Jessica Smith is the best attorney I have ever had the pleasure to work with. If you’re looking for an attorney who is not only excellent at what she does but also genuinely cares about you and your case, I highly recommend Jessica and the entire team at Gravity Law Firm.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Jen Hardee,
I am sorry I was not able to return your call in the time you expected. Please understand I am a solo practicing Attorney. I place a priority on the clients I am presently assisting with their legal issues. I have a limited amount of time and I need to be mindful of not over extending my schedule to the detriment of the needs of my current clients. I receive all messages and email inquiries myself. I do not have a staff to screen my incoming message. This does, at times, result in a delay in responding to new inquiries, depending on my current work load and other schedule demands. While I do try to return messages with in 48 hours, there are times I find I need to set a few hours aside at least once a week to return phone messages and emails. Due to the nature of my practice it is difficult for me to take on urgent matters for new clients.
I have not responded to reviews in the past but, I felt it was important to add some context to your comments.
I do note you were calling for a friend's legal matter not your own, we did ultimately talk. I did contact your friend and I did discuss her legal issue, I hope I was helpful with the information I provided to her.
I wish you and your friend all the best in the future." Dan Beatty

Knowledge: Sydney Jay Hall possesses a deep and thorough understanding of the law that is truly impressive. Timeliness: In every aspect of my case, Sydney Jay Hall was prompt and proactive. Deadlines were met with time to spare, and I was always kept in the loop with timely updates and clear communication. reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Mr. Richard Resma,

I'm sorry that you feel that way, but I hope you understand that pretending to be a client of our office to post bad reviews is an act of fraud. And to agree with "Christian Avila" –whom we never heard of before—but fraudulently posing as our client and going around various platforms to purposely damage the reputation of Attorney Hall, who's been practicing law for over 30 years, is a serious crime –which we will not take lightly. We allowed you to post these reviews to other sites before but enough is enough. It is now clear to us that you purposely want to damage Attorney Hall’s reputation to damage his career. We are always open to discuss issues with our clients and tried our best to resolve any conflict, so what you’re saying is simply not true. And going around pretending to be our client and writing bad reviews –to retaliate—is simply not fair.

Mr. Richard Resma is not a client of our office but a defendant on a lawsuit filed by our office. So this is his way of retaliating.

Mr. Hall has been practicing law for over 30 years and has helped hundreds of clients, so to call him a fraud is not only baseless but a serious allegation.

Robert Menache is impressively professional, experienced, intelligent, knowledgeable, high integrity, calm, and meticulous. Happily, Robert is gracious and kind too. You might think that you're better off with a mean, aggressive lawyer to represent you. Or a glitzy uptown law firm. Not so. The best, very smart, professional, experienced, focused lawyer gets the best results. And costs way less too. Mr. Menache is indeed the very best. He does what is exactly necessary to get the best fair result, without wasteful drama or grand-standing. He came through for me. Wonderfully! And it was a long hard case.

Robert is and is not a lawer.  Robert IS a lawyer in the sense that he knows his technical stuff.  Robert IS NOT  a lawyer in the sense that he does not have a money gouging attitude that one sees in some lawyers.  Robert remains focused enough to speak and advise where he needs to in a constructive manner and he will tell the 2 spouses to work things out by and for themselves [ due to subject matter involving personal preferences ]. I recommend Robert Menache highly to those that need a lawyer to deal w/ legal issues and repeat that Robert IS NOT A LAWEYER in capricious nor financially gouging conduct and mannerisms.

As a business and employment litigation attorney for both plaintiffs and defendants with more than 70 jury trials under my belt,  I know the difference between "litigators" and real trial attorneys.  The former are all too common in our profession, adept only at pushing paper, filing motions, and acting like keyboard warriors.  But when cases fail to settle and trial looms, those kinds of lawyers find themselves staring into an abyss.  They then either fold by unfairly compromising their client's case to avoid exposing their lack of trial experience, or stumble through trial with disastrous consequences.

Real trial lawyers, on the other hand, can take any case to the mat and win.  They don't bluff, because they don't need to.  Not only does this achieve better settlements for their clients, but if the case cannot settle these trial lawyers actually win.  Chris and Kevin Moon are both real trial lawyers, and excellent ones at that.  They are both tenacious, brilliant and powerfully effective.  I know this because I have worked with them both, and have seen their skill and dedication first-hand.  Whenever someone calls me with a personal injury matter, I immediately refer them to Chris and Kevin.  Even more, they are the lawyers I would want to represent me if I was ever injured.

If you are potential client, call them!  If you are a defendant on the other side of a case from them, be afraid.  Be VERY afraid.

I have worked with Chris Moon for many years and he always given me amazing legal advice.  Most recently, Chris helped me with a thorny legal issue. The attorneys at Moon Law, Chris and Kevin, are smart, dependable, and personable. They gave me clear and specific guidance, so that I was able to understand the underlying reasons for their advice, and they helped outline the best strategy for handling my legal issues.  If necessary, I definitely will be reaching out to them again.

Lauren was proactive from the beginning, making sure everything was organized and that I had what I needed to handle the real estate side of the transaction smoothly. Probate transactions can often be complex, but Lauren’s professionalism, attention to detail, and client-focused approach made this one feel easy and well-managed from start to finish.

I highly recommend Lauren Rios to anyone in the San Francisco Bay Area looking for a knowledgeable, responsive, and trustworthy probate or trust attorney. She is a true professional and a great partner to work with.

Lauren is great to work with - friendly, professional, knowledgeable, organized and communicative. She did an excellent job shepherding us through the very detailed process of estate planning. We highly recommend her.

I highly recommend the services of Lauren Rios. I restated my Living Trust with Lauren five years after drafting the original, and I found her to be both meticulous and patient in ensuring all my assets were properly incorporated. She was always available to answer my questions and provided thoughtful guidance throughout the process.

One instance that stood out was when Lauren carefully reviewed the beneficiary designations on my non-retirement accounts. At first, I was surprised by her request for details, but I soon realized I had overlooked adding the Trust as a beneficiary to a bank CD I had opened after the original Living Trust was created. Her thorough approach not only caught this oversight but also reinforced the importance of maintaining consistency in estate planning. Throughout the process, Lauren remained patient and understanding, never making me feel judged for the lapse but instead guiding me toward the necessary corrections with clarity and professionalism.

She was also highly conscientious, going the extra mile to make photocopies of my Advance Health Care Directive and HIPAA Authorizations so I could easily provide them to my medical providers. Since I was scheduled to visit my primary care provider, delivering these documents was seamless, and they are now properly scanned into my medical records.

Looking back, I am deeply grateful for the decision to restate my Living Trust with Lauren. There were several aspects of estate planning I had not considered at the time, and thanks to her diligence, I now feel confident that my executor will be able to carry out my wishes effectively when the time comes.

Mrs. Lauren Rios worked with my husband and myself with  creating our Trust and all estate planning documents. She was very thorough, knowledgeable, organized, and detailed. We are tremendously pleased with all of her completed work and would highly recommend her.

Lawrence Viola is an effective, ethical, hard working attorney who has been an absolute pleasure to work with in my divorce settlement case.  I recommend him very highly!

Robert Bruening practices serial malpractice as, at the moment, he has at least three such lawsuits pending against him of which I'm aware, including one from myself. I had a hard time finding a malpractice attorney for my case because of conflicts of interest with other former Bruening clients.

He went AWOL preceding my divorce hearings only to emerge one month later suddenly detached from his law firm, espousing the “opportunities” of practicing law as a one-man shop (with 45 cases he claimed were in motion) without the assistance of a paralegal or even a secretary. His unexplained absence caused my divorce to be postponed for two months.

Before the divorce proceedings, Bruening failed to deliver discovery to opposing counsel until the night before the trial and, subsequently, most of my evidence was excluded— during a two day trial separated by two weeks, he failed to introduce any exhibits vs. dozens from my ex-wife. Bruening’s opening arguments to the court consisted of an apology for botching the discovery. Things only went downhill from there. I lost large sums of money because I was hardly able to prove anything in the trial and it became starkly evident that little preparation had been done on my behalf—it was readily apparent he just winged it.

Throughout the course of his representation, Bruening failed on numerous occasions to follow-up on items that were reserved by the court for later consideration. And he filed many pre- and post-trial documents late--sometimes a week after opposing counsel had already filed to strike his responses.

Following the trial, he forgot to show up for a hearing with the judge and opposing counsel—and never told me about it—and I was subsequently served (twice!) for contempt without understanding why until I eventually sued him. It has been a real eye-opener to now read the exchange of emails between Bruening and opposing counsel, that I received in discovery on my malpractice case, where they are openly mocking him for his performance

Then, he missed the date to file an appeal and tried to cover up his bungling by representing that opposing counsel agreed to use a later date for the appeal—as if! I unwittingly proceeded with spending months and tens of thousands of dollars filing an appeal only to have it thrown out for untimeliness immediately afterward.

He spent nearly two additional years ineffectively trying to clean up outstanding issues from my divorce settlement; including filing motions for two long course hearings where he forgot to serve opposing counsel! I had to fire him and hire a new attorney for tens of thousands more to clean up the mess he created.
Wow

As a current client of Oliver Gutierrez law firm since 2020 in a high conflict divorce and custody battle I can not express enough the professionalism and devotion his law firm upholds from early meetings , weekend meetings or just working late on your case in preparation for court hearings , he present himself accordingly in court very organized and composed I have seen other lawyer walk into court with a lucky shopping bag as for Oliver very profesional has all organized in binder’s and well presented. As for his paralegal I can not thank enough she has been a wonderful supportive asset she is very accessible and has great knowledge in the legal system but also in personal aspect I wouldn’t trust any other law office to handle my case I would  greatly recommend Oliver Gutierrez and  Astrid Maldonado to handle your court case as well.

I strongly do not recommend him.

Oliver has represented me for a few years in a high conflict case with a very wealthy, litigious, bloodthirsty attorney with whom I had two children. The case was dragged on and made endlessly more complicated than it needed to be by the other side, but Oliver has handled the case very well and has shown himself to be extremely diligent and competent. He is reliable, reachable, will meet with you on weekends, nights, early mornings- he has devoted his life to his practice and has been unwaveringly encouraging and supportive despite how difficult and blown out of proportion this case has been made. I cannot recommend him enough, and after working with about 6 different family law attorneys, can’t see myself trusting anyone else to handle the case as well as he has.

reviews.text: Walter Cook is a true professional, who is very knowledgeable and fights very hard for your rights. I would use him again and would definitely recommend his services to friends and family.
Very professional lawyer, helped me get a great settlement for a bike accident.

I was referred to Walter Cook through a good friend of mine who is a very successful attorney who does not specialize in wills and trust litigation like Walter. At the time, I was in desperate need of firing my first attorney who exercised poor judgment, was arrogant, and in my opinion incompetent. My case was a total disaster, and to make matters worse, I was being charged exorbitant legal fees.

When I called Walter, he answered my call immediately and agreed to meet with me the very next day. I had interviewed many other attorneys before I met Walter. In my opinion, the majority of these attorneys were only interested in my case because they needed the billable hours. Walter was different. Walter stood out as the most qualified, most competent, most efficient and most trustworthy attorney that I had met to date.

Walter successfully extracted me from the worst storm of my life. I don’t think any other attorney would have been able to accomplish what he did. Walter did it with great expertise, exquisite finesse, tremendous compassion, and for reasonable charges. Walter is deeply committed to his client’s success. I will always be very grateful for his extraordinary guidance.

Walter is honest. He has great connections. He knows the law and, most importantly, Walter truly cares about the client’s best interest. Walter is the only attorney that I can recommend without hesitation and with 100% confidence.
I associated with Walter Cook on a major trust lawsuit.  His experience and insight were hugely useful in setting our strategy.  He is a highly useful and successful associate attorney.

People often say, and I agree, that Walter is  the best trust and probate litigation attorney in Northern California.  His courtroom and deposition skills are unmatched. I say this as a person who was twice myself designated as a Superlawyer in trust litigation.

'I called Walt because I was in a panic. My father had passed and I thought I was written out of the trust completely. I hired Walt to look at the complex trust documents I received from the executor and was informed that my panic was not justified, that I had actually been included in a fairly hefty portion of the family trust. I am very appreciative  of his knowledge, his attention to the law and for his advice. Now, I anticipate that Walt will help me navigate through the distribution process. Walt has no relation to my family.'

I approached this attorney about a very serious miscarriage of justice and they assured me they would look at the facts of the case and let us know if they could help. I sent documents over a month ago and when I checked in, I was told that they didn’t have the time to even look at the documents.  Mind you I had to call and check. The situation is life and death and Dean Johnson treated this as if it was just not important. I hope me and the defendant being black had nothing to do with it, but nowadays, you never know. The level of unprofessionalism is unacceptable and extremely disappointing, And usually characteristic of a racial or some other kind of unacceptable bias.
Valuable time was wasted, considering Dean Johnson as an option, when he had no intention on considering us.
Despite his reputation, You  will not be treated with respect if he perceives you was not being able to pay or he values you less than other potential cases for whatever reasons.

I would’ve paid whatever necessary to make sure justice was done in this case.
Extremely disappointed and cannot recommend.

I would like to commend Attorney Dean Johnson for his A+ legal services.  He recently achieved the unthinkable—through his expert defense, he got the CA DMV to dismiss a .20+ BAC DUI for me.  My full license was reinstated with no record and all fees with the DMV were waived.  I could not have hoped for a more favorable outcome.  Additionally, Mr. Johnson was so professional—he made himself completely available and took my case immediately.  His professionalism was only rivaled by his kindness and patience through my legal ordeal.  I could not give him a higher recommendation.  Thank you, Attorney Dean Johnson!

He won our case!  Dean represented me in a civil harassment case with my lunatic neighbor.  When I was served with a temporary restraining order, I knew I needed legal representation.  I heard about Dean through a friend.  I immediately called him and had an appointment within days.  I knew from our first meeting, I wanted to hire him.  He’s sharp!  A great listener, professional, and organized.

On our court date, Dean proved to be everything we needed to win!  Our opponent was an aggressive bully and in court his behavior was no different.  Dean had no problem putting him in his place.  Our hearing was exciting and shocking.  After our opponent saw Dean's hearing brief, the bully stormed out of the court room and fled the building.  It was a classic hilarious moment!  Our troubles were over.  The temporary restraining order against me was dismissed.  In addition, the judge ruled in our favor by ordering a 3 year restraining order against our neighbor.  The bonus to it all…our neighbor was ordered to pay a portion of our legal fees.  We couldn’t have been happier with the outcome!  Dean totally exceeded our expectations.  Thanks to him, we had a few great chuckles and can sleep a little better at night.
Nice office.
He has a very bad attitude & he needs to how to talk to people. He can be very unprofessional at times

Right to the point.  Clearly very experienced and knowledgable about the local law enforcement scene. Serious but a comic edge which made me feel much less nervous.  Was referred by a good friend and she could not say enough positive things about his personality and work.
The best
Wonderful lawyers.

I seriously can’t say enough amazing things about April & Natalia! They have been by my side for the past few years, and as a young business owner running my own little cafe, I truly don’t know what I would do without them!

From day one, they’ve guided me through so many legal situations that I would’ve had no clue how to handle on my own. Contracts, employee stuff, & just other issues that I never thought I would have — you name it, they’ve helped me navigate it all. And every single time, they make me feel heard, supported, and safe. Like, actually safe. They never talk down to me or make me feel like I’m asking a silly question — instead, they empathize and I can feel that they’ve got my back 1000%.

There are so many days where I’m overwhelmed running the cafe, juggling a million things — and when something legal pops up, it’s just such a relief knowing I can call them and instantly feel that weight lift off my shoulders. They explain everything so clearly and always make me feel confident in whatever decisions I need to make.

Thankfully, we’ve never had to go to actual court (knocking on wood!!) — but deep down, I just know that if we ever did, we’d win. No question. These women are so strong, sharp, and insanely knowledgeable — I’d trust them with anything.

It’s such a blessing having a lawyer who genuinely cares, fights for you, and gives you peace of mind. Thank you ladies!!

We were able to successfully create and stand-up our S Corp with ease and speed due to the outstanding legal services from Chauvel & Glatt.  April Glatt and Derek Myers were excellent in consulting us through the process, registering with the State and officiating our company.  Highly recommend their services for forming a small business!
Fantastic law firm to work with. Very professional and responsive.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much Tom! We enjoy working with you too!

reviews.text: The intelligence, integrity and professionalism of the entire Chauvel & Glatt firm is no less than incredible.   April, Ron and their entire supporting staff is dedicated to their clients and pure first class.   April is aggressive when needed while extremely fair and honest and her work ethic is exceptional.  Her experience is difficult to match and  I wouldn't use anyone else for my legal needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Lori!

reviews.text: April and her firm, Chauvel & Glatt, have been our corporate attorneys for several years now and helped us out tremendously from A to Z. They have handled everything for us from trademark matters to non-payment disputes and they have been an extreme help and a great assett for us. reviews.ownerResponse: Appreciate your kind words Gabriel!

reviews.text:
My girlfriend requested their services to create 1 operating agreement and 2 share certificates. She was told it will cost $1000.
Once the work was done and delivered, she received an invoice for about $2000 detailing everything that was done.
Some of the items listed in the invoice were ridiculous and expensive. Every little thing such as getting on a call, replying to an email, reviewing a document,... has been charged.
It does seem they charged her as much as they wanted to get as much as possible.
For big companies, I guess, it doesn't matter that much but for my girlfriend who is building her business on her own, with her savings and outside of her main job, it does!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Jerome,
I am sorry to hear that you are unhappy with our services. For a very simple LLC formation that doesn't involve complex shareholder structures, we typically charge around $2500 but the deposit required upfront is $1000. We've never told anyone and won't tell anyone that forming an LLC cost $1000. When we sent our clients the retainer agreement, the $1000 was the deposit as it stated. Our time spent on each case, including meetings, research, phone calls, and emails are all billable hours and we charge in minimum 0.1 unit of hours, i.e. 6 minutes. We've been in business for over 30 years and our fees are reasonable compared to firms that provide similar services.

reviews.text: April and her team have done both non-profit legal work and created a power of attorney for our daughter.  Her comprehensive knowledge of CA human resource, corporate and non-profit law was critical to guide our organization during a difficult restructuring.  As for out family, April’s sage and frank advice was welcomed by all of us as we discussed important life decisions.   Highly recommended app
reviews.ownerResponse: Always enjoy working with you Donna!  Thanks for the kudos!

reviews.text: Professional and dedicated.

I wholeheartedly recommend Marisa!  Working with her has been a wonderful experience marked by professionalism, expertise, and genuine care. In what can often be an emotionally charged and complicated process, Marisa brought a calm, steady presence and ensured every detail was addressed.  I am grateful for her guidance and service.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Caroline, for taking the time to share your kind words and for trusting me to take care of you and your family.

reviews.text: Marisa and her team made estate planning feel approachable and stress-free. They were kind, thorough, and incredibly responsive. I felt truly cared for every step of the way. Highly recommend if you want peace of mind and a team you can trust!

reviews.text: This is really a 4 3/4 Star review.  We updated our estate plan with Marisa, and she was great.  Knows her stuff. Has an efficient process for getting info from us and translating that into a finished document.  The missing 1/4 star is just because I felt a tiny bit rushed like I wasn't getting her answers quickly enough. I think this was due to tiny glitches in communication due to (a) a transition between paralegals and (b) Marisa trying to manage expectations on timing so clients don't just hang out there for many months.  So, yes, definitely patronize this business!  And if you are unclear on your "deadlines," just ask!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Nancy, for taking time to share your kind words and feedback. It really helps us better communicate and serve our clients. It's been a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: Marisa is such a responsive person. She listens to your needs carefully and answers all the questions clearly and patiently. If you need someone to help you with estate planning, Marisa is definitely the person you must speak with!

My brother passed away in the Bay Area without a will, and his family all lives out of state. I was referred to Marisa because of her probate experience in the area.  She skillfully guided us through the process of estate filing and distribution, including selling his house where her probate experience was especially value.  The entire process took over a year because of COVID-related court closures.  Marisa got things going as quickly as possible once the courts opened again.  She was very responsive with all legal matters and even helped us find local resources needed to consolidate his belongs.  She is a true professional and we give her our highest recommendation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much for taking the time to write a review. It was a pleasure working with you, and I'm so glad I could guide you through the process. Take care.

reviews.text:
Marisa has helped me for the last 5+ years with our planning needs. She was able to help get our Illinois estate plan transitioned to be California compliant and up to date. She also brought my parent’s estate plan into this century after unwinding ancient planning techniques employed by their earlier attorney.

More recently she provided me expert advice when I found myself as the executor of my aunt’s estate. She has also just assisted us with updating durable powers for my son who turned 18 at the beginning of the month - she is on top of it all!

I highly recommend Marisa and her entire team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to write a review! Always a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: Tim explained the details in a human digestible format, and was thoroughly humane with the tough stuff to talk about.

We needed to upgrade our estate trust established many years ago. We were referred to Marisa through a trusted colleague and were not disappointed. In a single meeting, Marisa reviewed the prior document, asked the right questions to establish what had changed and our intent going forward. We completed the online questionnaire which saved a lot of time for both of us. During the draft review of the new trust it was quite clear that this was the work of a real professional - not only had she considered our intent but it accounted for possibilities we had not anticipated. The entire process from start to finish took a month - mostly because we were traveling though Marisa was ready.

One thing we found refreshing was Marisa's responsiveness. She always responded within a day and when we had a challenge finding a date on her online calendar - she just made time for us when it was convenient for us. I highly recommend Marisa for all estate related matters.

Marisa helped us with our estate planning.  Despite having a child, we'd put it off for a number of years.  We found Marisa through Yelp.  She also provided references when we asked.  The references were glowing, and we're glad we went with her.

It was easy to communicate with her in person as well as over email.  We appreciated being able to fill out the questionnaire and schedule appointments online. It made it much easier to work around my husband's busy schedule.  She explained things very clearly.  We only had a general idea of what we wanted to do.  Marisa explained what options are common, what people typically choose in our situation (and why), and also was supportive in the areas where we wanted to do something uncommon.

When we were done with the legal portion, she also followed up with a list of tasks we need to do to truly complete our estate planning (eg. make sure your guardians have a copy of the will).

In fact Marisa made the process painless and relatively quick--I only feel bad that we waited so long to do it!  We look forward to working with her in the future when we need changes and would definitely recommend her to others!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Susan,
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your review! It was truly a pleasure working with you, and I'm so glad I was able to make it all quick and easy for you.
All the best,
Marisa

reviews.text: Sounds like one of the attorneys here is highly respected, but the guy Walter Shjeflo was terrible. They have been amazing to work with over my mom's estate

Vidhya is responsive, accessible, patient, thorough, and an expert in her field.  I highly recommend working with her!  She made the estate planning and trust process smooth and easy.  Thank you Vidhya!

Vidya made the estate planning process easy for us.  She clearly explained concepts and patiently answered questions. I was also impressed with her technical skills - she was able to quickly address our nuanced issues after another estate attorney was not able to do so.

We feel so lucky to have found Vidhya to help us with our estate planning.  She was extremely knowledgeable, patient, and responsive.  In addition to general estate planning she was also able to help us with regard to setting up a special needs trust for our son. I would unequivocally recommend her to anyone looking for estate or trust planning.
Had a wonderful and painless experience writing and revising our trust with Vidhya Babu. Easy to work with and responsive. Highly recommend.

Yvonne and I took a long time to do a Living Trust and when we finally decided it was time to do one,  we went to see Vidhya Babu.  As this was the first time for us, we had a lot of questions and had no idea of what we needed to do.  Vidhya was great ! She not only answered all our questions but patiently explained in details the pros and cons in developing a Living Trust that will fit our needs and protection.

That was nearly 10 years ago.  During the years we have reached out to her numerous times with questions not only about our Trust but also any issues or concerns we have had on Estate planning and she's always been very helpful and gracious.

We feel very fortunate to have Vidhya as our attorney.
Vidhya Babu sorted out my Mother's estate so well that my wife and I used her to prepare our own trust.  Great experiences with both matters.  I STRONGLY RECOMMEND!

As an attorney who strives to deliver first rate services for my own clients, it is truly a pleasure to work with Vidhya as one of her clients.  She is always thoughtful and responsive to our inquiries, and her up to date knowledge, careful analysis,  and network of advisors gave us tremendous confidence in her advice and practice.  We feel fortunate to have her as an advisor.

I found Vidhya Babu on a recommendation from a trusted friend. I worked with her and found her whole staff...shout out to Elizabeth who was very welcoming and professional. Vidhya was easy and pleasant to speak to, answered all my relevant questions, and was very competent. She set up my revocable trust and made the whole process easy. I would definitely  recommend Vidhya Babu to anyone who needs estate planning.

Vidhya Babu helped my wife and I set up our trust.  She took a daunting, complex task we put off for too long and made it simple and comprehensible.  She worked hard to understand our goals and desires, created a plan, explained the plan back to us to ensure it would meet our needs, and then executed on that plan until the trust was completed.  She followed up afterwards, to be sure we were still clear on all the details.  It was a great, painless process and we learned stuff along the way.  Highly recommended!!

Estate planning wasn't something we wanted to do but we felt we had to do it.   We were overwhelmed and didn't know where to start.   Vidhya Babu was amazing to work with.   She listened to our high-level thoughts and then laid out a preliminary plan encompassing both our estate and advanced health care needs.  Vidhya clearly laid out the pros and cons of each option along with her recommendations.    At the end of the process, we were confident in our plans and felt that we had been well guided by an attorney who truly cares about her clients wellbeing.

Our initial estate plan was written over a decade ago.   Through the years, as the laws have changed, Vidhya has regularly reached out to update us on new options are and the benefits of those options.

I would recommend Vidhya Babu as an estate planning attorney to anyone, anywhere.

I worked with Walter Shjeflo; In my opinion, he is what a lawyer should be...easy to speak with, experienced, knowledgable and happy to provide excellent legal counsel. You can't ask for more than that.

I've been a client of Fox, Shjeflo & Babu for several years. We worked with Vidhya Babu to first create our family's trust, and with her help, have evolved it over time to better fit our family's changing needs. My experience with Vidhya has been excellent throughout. I have referred her to numerous friends and family members who have had similarly wonderful experiences. Vidhya is very knowledgeable and trustworthy, and I highly recommend her.

I have worked with Fox, Shjeflo, Hartley
and Babu for several years.  I wanted to take a moment to let everyone know what a high level of service they provide.  Their knowledge of real estate and estate planning is exceptional.  Additionally they represented me in a successful lawsuit.

If you need any legal services, I strongly recommend to contact their office.

To have someone like John Simonson is to know that you are going to get the best legal support available. Thorough, professional, exhaustive in pursuit of protecting their clients. We were so fortunate to have them representing us.

Do you want to waste your time and your case, come to this lawyer, he is terrible, he is not professional since it took him almost 3 years to finalize our case and the last 6 months he took it with pure evasions, we spoke to him and he only said I continue working and in the end I did not even recover 5% since since it was a government institution, the one who destroyed my car did not even fight fairly, now my father is left all injured from his spine, arms and legs, think a thousand times about having him defend you, look for another lawyer who really fights for you and not for his pocket.

When I asked if I can schedule a call with the attorney, i was told I would have to call back to do that. To top it off, I never even got the documents to fill out. This was such a waste of time.

The attorney failed to show for our appointment so I can’t review their legal services. I had a consultation scheduled for which I waited 2 weeks. He said he would find someone to call me back and 2 months later I’m still waiting LOL

I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for the support, time, and guidance this law group have provided me during this incredibly difficult period. Their advice has been invaluable, and their willingness to help me navigate such a complicated and emotional process has truly made a difference.
I deeply appreciate the clarity, care, and patience they offered throughout each step. Knowing that I had a knowledgeable and compassionate team to turn to gave me strength and reassurance when I needed it most.
Thank you again for everything you have done — your contribution has been meaningful beyond words, and I am sincerely grateful.
Highly recommend! Very informative and helpful with small claims inquiries!

As a first-generation Latin American, most of us do not have many people to turn to for legal advice. I truly felt like my world was coming to an end at a time when I felt I was doing everything right and finally starting to make a great living for myself and my family.

Luckily, I came across Cesar through a gym where I was training. Everyone who knows Cesar at the gym knows that he is the most charismatic, helpful, and resourceful man not only for legal advice, but for anything you may need around the gym.

It was a no-brainer to go with Cesar and Iaccarino for help with my case. Sure enough, my landlord completely changed their actions, and I was finally able to live in peace.

Cesar and the entire group are true professionals who work from the heart. Without a doubt, they are worth every single dollar.

Thank you so much, Cesar our family is truly grateful for you and for the service you provide to the community!

reviews.ownerResponse: Good evening.  As we discussed, we successfully handle 25-30 cases just like yours every month, successfully and efficiently.  Due to the large volume of clients we service, initial consultations are with our legal assistant and paralegal staff and we reserve attorney appointments for escalations which are rare.  The paralegal you were speaking with is actually our most senior litigation paralegal and the most versed in the office when it comes to civil procedure.  It’s a shame you won’t be working with us, but we wish you the best.  Happy Holidays and good luck, we hope you are able to resolve your matter expeditiously.

reviews.text: For the past 3 meetings I've been promised some documentation and it was never provided. The wait time to schedule a call is over a week and I've basically wasted 1.5 months for nothing. The first couple of calls were effective, after that a complete waste of time.

We are fully staffed and available to talk to you Monday through Friday at our virtual office on our website so please drop by and let’s get this taken care of.

reviews.text:
This law firm's negligence severely impacted my case. After sending a demand letter, they took a month to share the other party's response, despite multiple follow-ups. The response was received just a day after our letter, making the delay even more egregious. The firm's apology seemed insincere, and their suggestion to proceed despite their mistake added to the frustration.
The paralegal, Cesar, was rude and impatient. I had to follow up multiple times for updates, which was frustrating. Unfortunately, the firm's service quality has declined significantly. I had previously given a positive review, but it seems they no longer have the time or care to handle cases properly. I would not recommend this firm to anyone.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Surbhi.  Looking into your case I see no fewer than 143 emails messages back and forth.  You left us a good review initially, because we did a good job, but sometimes, too much is just a little too much.  Good luck and we wish you the best.

reviews.text: Such waste of time. After our in-take call, they never followed up even after I called them twice. They just ghosted without any notice.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Micky, at Iaccarino Law Group, we schedule all matters through our calendar to ensure your case is moving efficiently. We ask clients to please schedule a Legal Appointment by visiting www.mylegalplan.org. Portal messages and emails aren’t monitored for immediate replies so our team can focus on substantive case work. Not everyone likes to make an appointment, and that's ok!  We are sorry it didn't work out.
Thank you very much for your kind review

reviews.text: I cannot speak highly enough about Iaccarino Law Group. From the moment I reached out, their team treated me with professionalism, respect, and genuine care. They took the time to understand the details of my case, explained every step clearly, and provided guidance that gave me confidence throughout the process, Thanks to their hard work and strategic approach, my case regarding custody. If you're looking for a law firm that is knowledgeable, compassionate, and relentless in pursuit of justice, I wholeheartedly recommend Iaccarino Law Group. Cesar and team Thank you!!!!
Ceasars is by far one of the best paralegal!!

Mr. Iaccarino and I have a history when he represented me in a dispute with my family over a written agreement.  That was over 15 years ago.

Fast forward to today.  I am a senior and would not wish this on anyone.  I own my condo located at the Peninsula Place HOA.  Last year the worst possible renter moved in next door.  Three months into his lease he began making noise complaints.  Six months into his lease he physically assaulted me so I filed an Elder Abuse TRO.  In the past five days he has made two unsubstantiated noise complaints against me.  Todays was the most recent.  Security came knocking at my door at 6:00 a.m.

Before reaching out to Mr. Iaccarino I called San Bruno PD; they have a copy of the Elder Abuse TRO.  They totally shot me down saying they would not take a report citing it was a civil matter.  This was when I reached out to Mr. Iaccarino.  I feel fortunate he answered my call.  He did a Lexis search on my neighbor as we were on the phone.  It gave him a glimpse of the person he was dealing with.  Within a short period of time, I was contacted by his associate, Cesar Gomez, with a draft Cease and Desist letter.  As a legal secretary, all I can say is wow.  It was remarkable to receive such a fast response.  If I was the recipient of the letter, I would think twice before making another unfounded noise complaint.  It was such a well drafted letter and checked off all the boxes.  Most important is that I did not feel alone.  As a new "senior" having semi-retired last year, my parents are gone.  Oftentimes I feel alone.  For the first time I felt as though someone had my back.  I can't speak highly enough of Mr. Iaccarino and Cesar Gomez.  Thank you for sending such a well-crafted Cease and Desist Letter on such short notice.
I enjoyed my first consultation wit Cesar and will pursue his recommended course of action. So far so good. John - HMB CA

I have had a very positive experience with both Ceasr and John. I have never had to get legal help before and was uncomfortable with the idea of it. They help me out step by step and made the process painless 5 stars.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank kindly Mr Mansfield! It's a pleasure working with you

I had a fantastic first consultation where I was instructed to add questions and felt like I had received support to file a complaint of a large caliber to the IRS. I needed help reviewing a government document that has potential to be life changing, and then additionally a recommendation of small claims, suing as a group, or clas action. Review: Iaccarino Law Group
Background
I recently embarked on the exciting journey of acquiring a small business. As a first-time business buyer, I knew I needed expert legal guidance to navigate the complex process. After researching several law firms, I decided to engage Stellar Legal Advisors based on their stellar reputation and client testimonials.

Experience
From the initial consultation to the final closing, my experience with Iaccarino Law Group was nothing short of exceptional. Here are the key highlights:

Expertise and Industry Knowledge: The attorneys at Iaccarino demonstrated an in-depth understanding of business acquisitions. They patiently explained legal jargon, answered my questions, and provided valuable insights into the nuances of the transaction.

Thorough Due Diligence: Iaccarino's due diligence process was meticulous. They reviewed financial records, contracts, and legal documents with precision. Their attention to detail ensured that no stone was left unturned.

Negotiation Skills: When it came to negotiating terms with the seller, Iaccarino's team was formidable. They advocated for my interests while maintaining a professional and respectful approach. Their negotiation skills were instrumental in securing a favorable deal.

Timeliness: Time was of the essence in this transaction. Iaccarino Law Group worked diligently to meet deadlines, ensuring a smooth and efficient process. Their responsiveness to emails and calls was commendable.

Transparent Fees: I appreciated their transparent fee structure. There were no surprises—everything was clearly outlined upfront. Their commitment to ethical billing practices was refreshing.

Outcome
Thanks to Iaccarino Law Group, I successfully acquired the business I had my eye on. The transition was seamless, and I felt confident throughout the entire process. Their legal expertise and personalized service made all the difference.

Conclusion
If you’re considering buying a business, I wholeheartedly recommend Iaccarino Law Group. Their professionalism, knowledge, and dedication set them apart. They don’t just handle legal matters; they become partners in your success.

If you’re thinking about estate planning or just want to get your affairs in order, Matt is someone I wholeheartedly recommend.

reviews.text: Ari is a great attorney.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. McG,

I've never represented anyone with this name. And before today, I never received an online review that was less than 5/5 stars on any site thus far in my career. I work relentlessly to get top results for each client I represent and have hundreds of former clients with very successful case results (as well as a very good reputation in and out of court) to support the quality of my legal representation and dedicated work ethic.

That said, I want to properly address your concerns and help make things right if and wherever possible. It's challenging, however, to reply here to an alias where I don't know whether you're a current or former client. Maybe you're a client's family member. Maybe you're someone whose case I couldn't take on for some reason or another. In any event, as a criminal defense lawyer, I know as well as anyone how critical it is to preserve and respect your privacy and confidentiality. Most clients -- past or present -- prefer to keep their cases private, which incidentally is why I don't go out of my way to seek hundreds of online reviews like other businesses. Thus, to the extent you are open to talking, and I hope you are, I ask that you reach out to me privately so that I can seek to remedy any perceived wrong. At the end of the day, I sincerely just want to help people. And, if you allow me the opportunity, hopefully I can work to help you, too.

Sincerely,
Ari

Vidhya Babu was recommended by a friend. At the time, my mother was diagnosed with ALS and did not have an updated will nor did she have a trust. After hearing the horror stories of how probate works my mother was agreeable to meeting with Vidhya. I am so grateful she did!

Talk about not knowing what you don’t know!  Vidhya was instrumental in getting all necessary documents up to date - advanced directive, durable power of attorney, release for protected health information, will and trust. My biggest concern was having the house put into the trust so we wouldn’t have to go through probate and I wouldn’t be kicked out of the house in a short amount of time.

Both mom and I asked many questions, many times. I was completely new to all of this and mom can be very demanding and pointed in her questions. Vidhya took the time to answer all of our questions in a way we could understand, never once being exasperated. In fact, Vidhya was very caring and genuinely concerned that we understood what she was explaining to us, she has the patience of a saint! Going through this process isn’t easy and Vidhya was there every step of the way guiding us.

When mom passed, Vidhya pretty much held my hand and guided me step by step on what I needed to do to follow mom’s trust. She took care of the title change which was huge for me. It was stressful enough during this time and I’m so grateful for Vidhya’s help.

In short order, I had Vidhya prepare my will, trust and other documents. Whew - so happy to have that done so my kids don’t have to stress about this. What a relief. As far as I’m concerned, it’s never too early to get these documents in order. You just don’t know what life might throw at you. What a gift to your loved ones to have everything spelled out and your wishes known.

I would also like to give a big shout out to Vidhya’s Paralegal,  Elizabeth!  Always on top of everything and also very helpful!

I wholeheartedly recommend the Law Office of Vidhya Babu for your estate planning and trust administration needs. I will say it again, it is never too early to get these documents in order!

What makes Vidhya so perfect for her profession? She actually enjoys what she does. This means she is motivated to keep abreast of estate law, which she is then able to explain in clear English to her clients. And she doesn’t roll her eyes when you ask her to repeat! And sometimes repeat again!

Thanks to Vidhya, Mike and I have wills, durable powers of attorney, advanced health directives, and a revocable trust which was created in 2010. We updated these documents in 2016, and then earlier this year, we did a complete rethink and rewrite.

Mike and I whole-heartedly recommend Vidhya as a consummate professional who will guide you as painlessly as possible through your estate planning.
