Currently, following the death of my adult son, Ms. Babu updated my trust, will, and advanced care directive. Once again I am most grateful for her expertise, efficiency, and compassion. I will continue to depend on her for my legal issues.

Thank you,
Anna H. Sever
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words, Anna. I'm so glad I could help.

reviews.text: My sister introduced me to Vidhya, and I am so grateful that she did! Vidhya is incredibly good at her job. Her easy manor and clear, thoughtful way of explaining uncomfortable situations pertaining to my trust gave me so much peace of mind. I'd give her 10 stars if I could!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Monika! You are too kind. Thank you for trusting me to help. I appreciate it!

reviews.text: A positive estate planning experience! Vidhya Babu was thorough and sensitive throughout. I appreciate that she kept me on task. Estate planning doesn’t need to be scary or dreadful. Thanks to Vidhya, I can sleep better at night!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words, Charisse. And trusting me to help. I really appreciate it!

reviews.text: Vidhya is so experienced and knowledgeable. She made the process of creating a comprehensive trust so pleasant and effortless. She not only helped me update my own trust, she has also helped me, as a trustee, to administer my father’s trust after he passed away. Her expertise and guidance through this challenging process was invaluable. Vidhya was actually recommended to me by another estate attorney for her higher level of expertise needed for my situation. I can’t recommend Vidhya  highly enough for estate planning and trust administration.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting me to help, Susan. I really appreciate all the kind words, and it was a pleasure working with you again. I'm so glad I was able to help!

reviews.text: Vidhya is amazing!  She helped me sort out all aspects of my fathers' estate, and handle all the elements left undocumented or in questionable status.  Please, do yourself (and your kids!) a favor and have these conversations with someone like Vidhya Babu who understands all the ins and outs of the legal system, and all the questions you need to ask yourself to prepare for the worst.  She is so kind and patient, and really helps you understand all the complexities into simple steps.
reviews.ownerResponse: Lisa, I'm glad that I was able to make a difficult process a bit easier. Thank you for your kind words and for your trust and confidence in me. I'm so glad I was able to help!

reviews.text: Vidhya is careful, professional, personable and thoughtful in her approach to clients. Creating your estate plan and drafting your will and trust requires thinking through some of the worst possible things that could happen to your family. Vidhya guided us through the process in a way that left us confident that should any “worst case scenario” come to pass things will be okay for our kids - but just as importantly, in the “normal” course of events, things will also be okay. We recommend Vidhya whole-heartedly as a smart, sophisticated, kind-souled and serious estate attorney. She’s also a wonderful human being!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Hannah. I am so glad I was able to alleviate some of the stress that sometimes comes from estate planning and thank you for such a kind review. I'm grateful for the opportunity to help. Thanks for thinking of me!

reviews.text:
My family and I have been clients of Gilfix & La Poll Associates law firm for over 20 years. Nicholas Klingenberg, Esq represented our mother’s estate in the California Probate process this past year.  From the initial consultation through the final distribution of assets, he demonstrated exceptional professionalism, legal expertise, and personal sensitivity during a time that was both legally complex from co-executors from in two different states to the Last Will and Testament beneficiary’s perspective and emotionally challenging.
Mr. Klingenberg approached every aspect of the case with thoroughness and clarity. He communicated all legal procedures and requirements in a way that was easy to understand, ensuring that we were well-informed and confident at each stage. He promptly addressed our questions, provided regular updates, and handled all paperwork with precision and efficiency.
One of the most commendable qualities Mr. Klingenberg exhibited was a genuine commitment to fairness and the best interests of all involved parties. He navigated potentially contentious issues with tact and impartiality, helping to preserve family relationships while still upholding the law.
Thanks to his guidance, the probate process proceeded smoothly, on schedule, and with minimal stress. He was not only a skilled legal advocate but also a compassionate advisor, offering reassurance and clear direction throughout.
I am deeply grateful for the high level of service and integrity that Mr. Klingenberg brought to this matter. I would confidently recommend him and Gilfix & La Poll Associates to anyone in need of probate or estate legal services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much, Alan! We are thankful we’ve had a chance to serve your family for so many years, and we are very glad the probate process went well. The loss of a loved one is so hard, no matter what. We thank you for the opportunity to serve you and your family through the legal side of that process. Thanks again!

reviews.text: A wonderful law firm that provides comprehensive legal planning for families.  Friendly,  insightful, helpful, and extraordinarily knowledgeable in this area of law. Everyone was very nice and responsive but low scores in our experience, customizing documents and general billing. 1) Very high fees but then still nickel and dime on top of it was what we felt. 2) We think that the customization of documents from templates could have been much greater for the $10k in fees. 3) We took notes during meetings but still billed high attorney rates just for note taking on top of the hourly consultation fees because they also chose to take notes....
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re genuinely sorry to hear that your experience with our firm didn’t meet your expectations. While we don’t have a record of direct communication with you regarding these concerns, we always appreciate hearing from our clients, as it helps us improve and maintain the high standards we strive for.

We understand that legal services can be an investment, and we aim to provide value by offering personalized, quality service to our clients. Our team works diligently to ensure that all documentation and advice are tailored to meet each client’s unique needs, and we understand that expectations for customization are important. We always seek to balance thoroughness and efficiency with the specific requirements of each individual case. Many of the tools we have developed over our decades of experience may not appear to be "custom," but they are proven to provide powerful tax and asset protection across multiple generations, sometimes saving families $100s of thousands, or more, in tax exposure and asset protection.

Regarding billing, we aim to be transparent and fair. While we know this response is late, we would welcome the opportunity to discuss your concerns in more detail so that we can address them properly and ensure that all charges are understood.

We are grateful for the opportunity to serve you, and we hope that you’ll give us a chance to resolve these matters. If you would like to speak with us directly, please don’t hesitate to reach out. We’re always here to assist.

Thank you again for your feedback.

reviews.text: Excellent explanations of options for updates to Trusts, Wills, Durable Power of Attorney and Advanced Health Directives.  Helped with changes in property ownership registry to maximize tax savings for years to come.

Heather at Gilfix & La Poll is an absolute pleasure to work with. She made all transactions smooth, easy and efficient. She is very responsive when questions come up and she quickly follows up to get the correct answers. Anyone that works with her will be very satisfied with the results.

Mark is incredibly knowledgable and helpful. He knows the ins and outs of estate planning and really helped us to understand as well. Have complete confidence in trusting this major aspect of life to Mark and the rest of the team at Gilfix and La Poll!

My family and I have relied on Michael Gilfix and his staff for a number of years.  They are professional, friendly, and helpful in every way and present options in a coherent, understandable way.  I cannot recommend them highly enough.  Great team!

I am so grateful for the superlative help, guidance, professionalism and sensitivity with which my family's situation was addressed. I find it extremely rare to come across individuals who are as skilled at the emotional aspect of such matters as estate planning as they are the legal element. A process that could have been extremely complicated was seamless, smooth and swift. I cannot recommend Glifix & La Poll highly enough.

Mark and his team helped us execute an estate plan in record time, even in the midst of COVD-19. While estate planning is never an easy task, we found Mark's approach to be straightforward, efficient and creative. Mark spent significant time learning about our specific needs, and then quickly formulated a plan to meet them. Our end result far exceeded a generic off-the-shelf plan - we benefited from his deep knowledge of the law, and are very pleased with the end result.

The peace that has come from the completion of our special needs trust is unprecedented.   I first attended the seminar offered by Gilfix and La Poll about 4 years ago and was very impressed – I knew then that the only way to really offer my medically dynamic young son and his young brother  true security after we have passed was through the implementation of a special needs trust.  Navigating the details was easy with the help of Mark Gilfix who walked us through the entire process with patience and respect, we asked many questions and were met with great intelligence and experiencial solutions.  These matters are very personal and sometimes emotionally dynamic so having the right team is of great importance..  There were many nueances with our circumstances and Mark and the team really did an incredible job securing our wishes and interests.  We are truly grateful for the peace of mind we now have with the help of Gilfix and La Poll.  Not only do I recommend them as a valued member of your team but I encourage anyone who is on the fence with the development of a trust to dive in and get it going – it is the adult thing to do.  Thanks Mark and staff for EVERYTHING and treating us like family along the way.

Sincerely,

Nicole and family

Those lawyers only charged a consultation fee and then never answered our calls again, failing to contact us on scheduled appointments. However, Mr. Utku believed in our case, and we began working with ALO.

During the process, we encountered numerous problems stemming from USCIS. Our E-2 case was unfairly rejected. Our legal rights were repeatedly disregarded. Before our appeal was even finalized, USCIS scheduled a deportation hearing for me. Our appeal was left pending. We experienced significant difficulties for 1.5 years. However, we trusted the ALO team, and together we overcame every obstacle.

First, they postponed my deportation hearing, then they had it canceled. They overturned the previous rejection decision through a Mandamus case. Finally, they secured a new and favorable decision for our case. They granted us investor status for a record-low investment fee.

I would like to express my sincere gratitude to everyone who was constantly by our side throughout the process, especially Mr. Utku, Ms. Rabia, Mr. Anıl, Ms. Bilge,
Ms. İlke, and all the other team members whose names I cannot remember. Thanks to them, we won our legal battle and obtained our status.

5 Stars - Outstanding Experience with Golden State Trusts

My wife and I finally took the leap to create a Living Trust and Will for our two kids after putting it off for too long. We discovered Golden State Trusts through Yelp and were impressed by their stellar reviews and local presence in our community.

Jonathan, Casey, and Jessica were exceptional throughout the entire process. What stood out most was their professionalism, expertise, and remarkable ability to break down complex legal concepts into language we could easily understand. From our very first consultation with Jonathan, we felt confident we'd made the right choice. He genuinely took the time to get to know our family and made us feel at ease every step of the way.

The team's approach was patient, educational, warm, and personable. They were incredibly thorough yet extremely accommodating with our busy schedule. What we expected to be a time-consuming, complex process turned out to be surprisingly easy and efficient - mostly just answering questions and completing a survey.

If you're hesitating about estate planning, I can't recommend Golden State Trusts enough. We thought this would be complicated and drawn-out, but we were genuinely shocked at how straightforward they made everything. The peace of mind knowing our children and assets are protected is priceless. We're already planning to work with them again in a few years for updates. You're truly in great hands with this team!

reviews.text:
We were connected to Golden State Trusts through our corporate MetLife plan so we could create a family trust and update our living will documents.  From the beginning, Golden State made the entire process easy, and we finished everything in 3 weeks.  It only took us 2.5 hours total of our time: an introductory 1 hour meeting to figure out everything needed, a second 1 hour meeting to understand all the paperwork and designate the right people.  I spent 30 minutes of my own time to fill out the names, addresses, and phone numbers of each key person on our paperwork.  It was all done in an easy to use & confidential shared folder system.

Overall, we truly appreciate Golden State's friendliness, willingness to help us understand what we were creating at our level (neither of us are legal experts!), were extremely responsiveness, and again made it all easy.

reviews.text:
Whether you need help with creating a trust, administering an existing trust, detangling yourself from a poorly written trust, navigating probate, or anything else related to estate planning, look no further than Golden State Trusts if you are in California.

My personal experience with them includes observing how they helped a friend of mine with administering an existing trust, and then how they helped my aunt interpret, navigate, and execute a poorly-written and structured trust.

My reasons for recommending them are simple:
1)  Clear Communication:  Jonathan, Casey, and Jessica explain complicated things in a simple way.  And if it's still not clear, they are patient with questions until the answer is clear.

2)  Authentically a Service Organization:  They are transparent in what they are doing or not doing for you, and convey a sense of care and trust that they are there to help you.  They identify only what you need and do not tack on extraneous forms nor use mysterious terms that other attorneys do (my aunt experienced this with two previous attorneys before we found Golden State).  The initial meeting is complimentary and full of content and advice, and they are there to help you even after that meeting if you have questions.

3) No Hidden Fees: Costs are reasonable and quoted up front at a fixed price.  There is no exhorbitant hourly rate with an uncomfortable open-ended checkbook needed. Many services were surprisingly complimentary.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Janice, it's an honor.

reviews.text: The team at Golden State Trusts was fabulous! I put off doing a trust for years as I assumed it was complicating and painful. It was neither of those things. They were so organized and professional. The process was seamless and now I have peace of mind.
reviews.ownerResponse: Kathy, It was such pleasure working with you. Thrilled that you had a good experience. We are here if you need us in the future as well :)

reviews.text:
I reached out to several trust law firms because my mother was very ill and she had only done a very rudimentary trust through one of those online providers that was woefully inadequate.
Jonathan and Jessica from Golden State Trusts were by far the most responsive from all the folks I was in contact with.  I cannot begin to explain how thankful I am that I found Jonathan and Jessica.  They understood our need to expedite the trust and will as quickly as possible over the weekend.  Jessica was even out of town on vacation camping and broke away from her family to meet with us to ensure my mom’s trust was completed expeditiously and thoroughly.  My gratitude goes out to Jessica and her entire staff for working the weekend on zero notice to complete our trust by Monday.  They both spent hours with my mom, brother, and I to ensure the trust was set up to be most beneficial to our family.  They prompted us to thoroughly discuss all needs and goals and proposed a structure for the trust that would best meet those goals.
Finally, we are so grateful for the kindness and empathy that Jessica had for our family during this difficult time.  As stressful as our situation was, Jonathan and Jessica made 100% sure that our need to quickly execute a trust did not add any additional stress.
Saying that we recommend Golden State Trusts is definitely an understatement.

As reluctant as I was, I had nothing to lose. I was worried we would not succeed since he seemed a bit unprofessional. I trusted him anyway and 1 year and a half later my husband got his residency! We were very happy, appreciative and thankful that we only spent about $2500 (less than 1/4  of what we had previously spent) including all the fees for the USCIS forms and biometrics.

This person is NOT a lawyer. He charged me $600 to file my asylum application and said he would send it to Immigration Court, but he sent it to the wrong address. Don't be scammed by people who call themselves lawyers but haven't studied law.

I'm a bay area real estate broker/agent. I've referred Carmen to a few of my clients. All of which would tell me she would never return their calls or they could never connect with her. Should have learned then but instead I decided I should give her a try myself for my estate planning documents especially since we had done some events together. Never did I think my estate planning documents would take over a year to complete.

I signed our engagement letter 6/3/22, the first payment link was sent to me on 6/4/22 (quick turnaround). I had an in-person meeting with her on 7/28/22 after rescheduling on my end a few times due to personal reasons. Soon after I provided all of my documents to her and we scheduled a follow up meeting for 9/22/22.

I didn’t hear anything back from her until 11/14/22, with another payment link for another service she provided. At that moment I inquired about finalizing my trust documents, her office told me they were going to mail them to me the following week. One month goes by and I inquire again on 12/6/22. She claims she is onboarding new team members and has been understaffed. On 12/20/22 I ask her if she was able to find an attorney out of state to put my properties in the trust. She claimed she did and that she would have the deeds ready the following week. January came and went and zero communication from her or her office. I inquired again on 2/3/23 - following up on the mobile notary to sign & finalize trust documents. Another person in her office responds back and I finally get a mobile notary scheduled for 2/9/23. I assumed this was it and I was just waiting around for my executed county stamped documents to get mailed back to me. Well June comes around and I still haven’t received anything back. I inquire again on 6/6/23. She says she is checking with her assistant. No communication again until I inquire again on 6/27/23. One property was finally taken care of and confirmed received by the county on 7/11/23. The other property was finally taken care of in late Sept 2023.

My frustration is the lack of customer service/communication. I understand small businesses tend to get understaffed or are going through business changes but if my services are paid for and I have to constantly be contacting you for an update and most of the time you don’t respond, then there is something wrong! This tells me this business doesn’t value its clients. Posting this review now in case this will help others determine whether to use her services or not. I also know other small businesses that have used her & have had a similar or worser experience so that tells me I’m not the only one.

Carmen Rosas is an incredible professional attorney. I was blessed and fortunate to have found her to prepare our family Living Trust, not only is she an experienced, effective legal expert but a caring warm person, sensitive to her clients needs.
I felt as if I was talking to a friend. Carmen walked me through the process, and more than met all my expectations.
I also interacted with her office staff and was impressed by their courtesy and quick response.
Being bilingual and bicultural her services are valuable and important to our community. I am referring her to family and friends. May God continue blessing Carmen, her staff and family.

I am deeply grateful to Mr. Ali Yousefi and his team for their outstanding support throughout my very difficult and complex three-year divorce case. Due to my former spouse’s complete lack of cooperation, this was an extremely stressful and challenging process. However, he stood by me every step of the way and never once left me feeling alone.

He and his highly skilled team demonstrated exceptional knowledge of the law and careful attention to every detail, but just as importantly, they gave me true peace of mind during one of the hardest periods of my life.

Unlike many attorneys who constantly send invoices and create additional stress, he never pressured me financially and did not request payment until the very end. Instead, he consistently reassured me that everything was moving in the right direction.

Thanks to his professionalism, dedication, and genuine support, I was able to successfully finalize my case. I wholeheartedly recommend him and his office to anyone facing divorce or other legal matters. If you are looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, ethical, supportive, and truly cares, he is an excellent choice.
Mercedeh.

My experience with the Law Offices of Ali Yousefi was a complete waste of time. Over the course of three months, I called three separate times, explained my situation in detail, and provided all the requested information. Each time, I was told that a lawyer would “reach out soon,” but I never once received a callback or follow-up.
If you value your time and need real legal help, I recommend looking elsewhere.

Ali Yosefi is an exceptional lawyer , he was always easy to reach out , very knowledgeable , kind and professional .

He was able to help me and guide me throughout my divorce process with utmost dedication .It's not easy to go through a divorce process but having a competent and skilled lawyer on your side can make a great difference .

I want to thank Ali and his team for their commendable work !

I had an excellent experience working with Ali for my divorce. He was exceptionally prompt and responsive - rarely taking more than a few hours to reply, and I almost never had to wait full 24h for him to act. In a field where delays are common, this level of timeliness made a huge difference.

He brought clarity to situations where the opposing counsel was intentionally trying to confuse or muddy the issues. His ability to cut through noise, explain things clearly, and stay grounded in facts and strategy was invaluable.

Most importantly, he minimized stress throughout the process, which was especially critical in my case where the other party was using questionable tactics. His calm, practical, and solution-oriented approach kept the process moving forward without adding emotional or legal chaos.

I would highly recommend him to anyone looking for a competent, responsive, and steady divorce attorney who prioritizes clarity and efficiency.
Ali is sharp, strategic, and genuinely supportive. He has a knack for knowing precisely which move to make and when, consistently steering things toward positive outcomes.

Needing a divorce or family law attorney is not always a pleasant experience. However, if you find yourself in need of an attorney for divorce or family law then Ali and his team is where you need to go. Ali takes the time to explain procedures without making this overly complicated. He also has a team of people working on your case to move things along. Lastly, their court presence is felt and they are articulate on your behalf. I would highly recommend Ali and his team.

I had an incredibly positive experience working with my attorney throughout a very challenging and prolonged case. He provided accurate information at every stage, guided me through all the complexities, and made sure I always understood my options.

His communication was very clear, and he never hesitated to take the necessary actions promptly. He was swift, strong, and confident in asserting our points, which gave me a lot of reassurance. Thanks to his dedication, professionalism, and strategic approach, I was finally able to get the closure I needed.

I’m truly grateful for his support and would highly recommend him to anyone seeking a knowledgeable, reliable, and compassionate attorney.

I worked with Ali and his team for my divorce, and I’m grateful for the support I received. When I was first looking for a lawyer, there were many recommendations, which made the decision overwhelming during a really difficult time. He was referred to me by two people I trusted, and he was so knowledgeable and easy to talk to..

The process took years, but that was due to the circumstances of the case, not his handling. Throughout everything, he remained steady, patient, and supportive. He consistently made recommendations that fit my needs and situation. His staff was also very kind, respectful, and easy to communicate with, which made a big difference during a stressful time.

I’m relieved that this chapter is finally closed, and I gained the ability to move forward with my life. I appreciate the dedication and care that helped me get here.

I had an outstanding experience with Ali and his team. From the very beginning, I felt completely supported and in the best hands. Unlike other attorneys I spoke with, who were either dismissive of my feelings or overly aggressive, Ali truly respected my wish to resolve things amicably while providing clear, practical guidance. He also took my cultural background into account and offered insightful advice that made me feel truly understood. Compared to other attorneys, his level of expertise and confidence was exceptional. I also learned a great deal from them—throughout the process, their explanations were highly educational and helped me understand every step and implication clearly.

Both Ali and Karl were impressively responsive and made the entire process much smoother than I expected. Our meetings were always efficient and productive, and he addressed every question thoroughly and with care, which gave me confidence every step of the way.

This was one of the most difficult times in my life, and I am genuinely grateful for Ali’s outstanding work, which helped me power through it. He exceeded my expectations in every way. I would wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone seeking an attorney who combines top-notch expertise and professionalism while respecting each client’s needs.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Yousefi Law strongly disagrees with the statements made in this review. We have no record of ever having a client by your name.

Upon further investigation, we note that six of your seven reviews originate from Russia, with this being the only exception.

Additionally, we find it suspicious that one day after this review was posted, we received a solicitation offering to have it removed.

reviews.text:
You can't go wrong with Ali and his team.

From the start, Ali was great. He paid attention to what I said, he encouraged me, and he fought for me all the way. He heard me crying on the phone so many times, and still he was patient and empathetic. I found Ali after my previous lawyer treated me badly and acted like what was happening was my fault.

Ali defended me, but most importantly, he believed me. I knew he was going to fight for me the same way even if I was guilty, but knowing he knew I was not, and him giving me support made me strong. Many times I wanted to give up, to leave everything behind, and then he would ask me to take time to think, would call me and explain why I should not stop the fight.

I finally signed all the papers - the divorce, court documents - so Ali and I are done with our client/attorney relationship, but he can be sure I will love him for life. Every day of my life I will put him in my prayers, along with his family, and hopefully all the news I hear about him will be about how great he's doing. He deserves it.

Hire him - every penny will be worth it. He's not someone who's doing this just for money; he cares for the people he works with.

I tried looking everywhere for someone who could answer the many questions I had, I could not. They carefully walked me through each step and answered every question I had about my situation.

I was overwhelmed with my whole situation but thanks to this team I got the support I needed.I truly felt they were advocating for me the entire time. They helped resolve everything as quick as possible. I would highly recommend them!

Going through a divorce is not easy, but working with Ali and his team honestly made a huge difference. He was super knowledgeable, easy to talk to, and always quick to respond when I had questions. I really appreciated how he explained things in a way that made sense and never made me feel rushed or overwhelmed.

He handled everything with professionalism but also had a calm, down-to-earth vibe that helped me stay grounded through the whole process. I felt supported the entire way and am really happy with how everything turned out.

If you’re looking for a solid divorce lawyer who actually cares and gets things done, I’d definitely recommend Ali and his team.

Professional, Meticulous, Compassionate and Tactful

I am pleased to share my experience with Ali Yousefi, who I consider one of the premier lawyers in California. During the challenging times of Covid, I embarked on a personal journey involving a Divorce and Child Custody case. Initially, I consulted several lawyers, but I found that they lacked an understanding of the intricate family dynamics and legal complexities involved. My case involved issues such as Parental Alienation and Financial Abuse, among other challenges commonly associated with complex divorces.

My cousin discovered and recommended Ali Yousefi after reading his profile on Yelp. I reached out immediately. From our first interaction, both Ali and his legal team showed a genuine commitment to advocating for my interests and those of my children, who had been kept from me. Ali's approach was both strategic and skillful throughout the process. He maintained a balance between being amicable and assertive when necessary.

Today, I am pleased to share that reunification efforts have been successful; I have my youngest child with me full time and a much-improved relationship with my young-adult son. None of this would have been possible without the exceptional representation provided by Ali and his team. I am profoundly grateful for their support, and I wholeheartedly recommend Ali Yousefi for anyone seeking diligent and effective legal counsel. His transparency, passion, and commitment to achieving the best outcomes for clients make him an outstanding choice in family law matters.

Excellent, Professional service with the administration of my divorce!  In spite of numerous delays ( on my part! ) Ali and his team were patient, professional and accommodating.  I would highly recommend Ali Yousefi and his team for your divorce administration.
Thank you Ali.

Success Story: A Decade After Bankruptcy — How Ryan Woods Helped Me Rebuild and Thrive

Ten years ago, I filed for bankruptcy. It was one of the hardest decisions I’ve ever had to make. I didn’t know what life would look like afterward, but I knew I needed help. That’s when I found attorney Ryan Woods, who turned out to be more than just legal support — he became a key figure in setting me on a new path.

Fast forward to today: one of my clients, someone I work with in my current industry, just happened to hire Ryan Woods as well. That coincidence reminded me how far I’ve come, and how instrumental Ryan was in helping me get here.

Ryan didn't just help me navigate the bankruptcy process — he connected me with the right people and gave me the tools and strategies to rebuild. Within a year, my credit score had bounced back to around 730, and it’s stayed strong ever since. Within two and a half years, I was able to buy a home — something I never thought would be possible so soon after bankruptcy.

A lot of people assume bankruptcy is the end, but Ryan helped me see it as a fresh start. Over the last decade, I’ve been able to secure business loans, auto loans, home equity lines, and other key financial tools because of the credit discipline I built early on. Today, I am officially debt-free, and I’m already halfway through the principal on my mortgage.

If you're working with Ryan Woods now or thinking about rebuilding your credit after bankruptcy, here's what I want to tell you: don’t stop at the finish line of the bankruptcy process. That’s just the beginning. Keep going, keep learning, and your success will grow.

The moral of the story? When it comes to your goals — whether it’s buying a car, starting a business, or owning a home — it’s rarely a matter of no. It’s a matter of when. Build good habits. Stick to them. And your financial life will follow.

Thank you, Ryan Woods, for helping me reclaim my future. I encourage others to believe in this journey — it is absolutely possible.

I retained Mr. Wood after my Chapter 13 case was dismissed. This dismissal was unopposed by my previous attorney so the case was dismissed by default. After doing some research on my own (I’m sure lawyers love it when their clients do that,) I called numerous attorneys to ask if they could file a motion to oppose the dismissal. Every single attorney I called (apart from Mr. Wood) told me my only option would be to file a new Chapter 13 case and start a new 5 year process of making payments despite already having made almost 4 years of payments.

When Ryan assessed my case, he told me he would immediately file a motion to vacate the dismissal. He was incredibly thorough and made sure to cover everything, asking me tons of questions about my life and the circumstances surrounding my missed payments and subsequent dismissal of my case. Within a few hours, we had a plan of attack, he told me exactly what I needed to do, and the next day he filed a motion to vacate the dismissal. A couple days later my chapter 13 case was reactivated. This meant that I didn’t waste 4 years of monthly payments and that I could continue on with my plan payments to repay my creditors.

Ryan navigated all of this while setting expectations and not making any promises. I did however have total confidence in his abilities and I knew that he would be my best option if I wanted a fighting chance at getting this resolved. It’s so clear that Ryan deeply cared about me as a client. Ryan gave me back my sanity, my happiness, and allowed me to continue on my pathway to financial freedom. Thank you for being an excellent human being. You are one in a million.

The transparency and knowledge he shared along each step of the way, not to mention his follow through was impeccable.  My Ch. 7 was discharged a couple months back! I highly recommend working with Ryan when it comes to filing for bankruptcy!  Thank you for all your help Ryan! - Audra

My once low-interest-rate payment on my credit card spiraled out of control; they started charging over 22% interest monthly on my cards. I tried and tried to make all the payments until I realized this is an uphill battle that is getting worse each month. I reached the point that I did not have enough money monthly to pay them now. I called my creditors asked them if they could lower the interest rate back to the 6.99% or lower than what it is currently; explained that I was struggling to make the payments at this time; all I heard was No we cannot do that. I must say, I was so worried about the thought of filing bankruptcy. I was scared and I felt bad to have to do this to my creditors but they were not willing to work with me. I then decided to research bankruptcy attorneys. I called a few many had a recording asking me to leave a message, during my search online I came across The Law Offices of Lin & Wood they have an office in Redwood City and Fremont. I live in Hayward so the Fremont office worked for me.  I then went on the Better Business Bureau website to see if they were an Accredited Business and if they had any complaints filed against them? I also wanted to see the rating giving to them by the Better Business Bureau. I was thrilled to see they were Accredited and holds an A+ rating; I felt good knowing this information. I guess my biggest concern was if I was going to file I needed to feel comfortable with the law firm that would walk me through this huge endeavor I was about to undertake financially.  I was confident with their BBB  A+rating I located the best firm  in the east bay.  My first attempt calling the office Mr. Ryan Wood answered the phone; I explained my situation and the urgency to get this started.  He listened without interrupting me, when I stopped he started providing me with the needed information.  He also squeezed me into his schedule the same day I was truly impressed.  I met with him he explained everything in a way that was easy for me to understand what was going to happen step by step. I retained him that day; he instructed me to gather the latest invoice for all my credit cards as well as any other debt I am obligated to pay then turn it into him. He informed me I had to fill out a monthly expense sheet that he would provide; this expense sheet assists him in determining what type of bankruptcy would be best for me to file chapter 13 or 7. I have to admit Mr. Ryan wood told me the truth; each step happened just like he said they would. I am pleased to say I now live comfortably without worrying how am I going to pay my bills any longer and I do not have any creditors sending me letters or calling my phone or work. He does allow you some time I believe it was 60 days to pay the full down; he explained the case would be on hold not being worked until they received the full down payment.  I decided I needed to pay this now to get the ball rolling even if I had to borrow it; I didn't want any wage garnishments to start? I did pay it in full within a day; three months later I met him at the courthouse in Oakland; shortly following the court appearance my bankruptcy case was done.  Thanks to Mr. Ryan Wood I am now living a stress-free life.  He is truly the best and has a vast amount of experience in bankruptcy law!!  You're in good hands if you retain him.  I hope this review helps calm your nerves; I know how nervous I was at the beginning stages. Good luck!

We find that their fees are reasonable and comparable to other law firms.  Since I used to work for a large Corporate Law Firm this is familiar to me. For us, when dealing with something as critical as a Trust and a Will, we find that the most important factor to us is finding the right attorney that you trust and where one has complete confidence in to execute what needs to be done and carried out accordingly.

In all of our visits, we always arrived early and we were seen promptly at our scheduled appointment time this has been our overall experience.

If you are searching for a firm that is reputable, knowledge and has compassion, we would highly recommend that you at least visit with them to make your own informed decision.   A trust or a will is not something to be treated lightly or a time to bargain search for the best price.  The saying goes, we get what we pay for.   We highly recommend this firm, so you can have peace of mind that your loved ones are taken care of when the time comes.

reviews.text:
I was mentally exhausted for one year and want to warn anyone who will be bothered by noise and cold & unresponsive landlord. This is a review for an apartment at 148 Southwood Ctr Apt 4, South San Francisco, rented from Cary Kletter of Kletter Law.

However, to be fair, here are some good things about the apartment.

The pros:
* lots of sunlight during the day and the whole house is well-lit with ceiling lights during the night.
* Washer/dryer is one of the best compared to other places. (Samsung front-load large size)
* Nice wood flooring throughout.
* Nice floor plan with no waste of space
* Tons of kitchen cabinets for storage
* Double-paned glasses cuts outs voices. (*but the building structure itself allows all kind of low-frequency sounds to pass through the walls)
* Good ventilation due to having a relatively stronger kitchen vent than normal and lots of windows
* Rent is relatively cheaper than the surrounding managed apartment considering its square footage and number of bedrooms

Here are the downsides of it that made me moved after living for a year

Unresponsive, unfriendly and very cold landlord (Cary Kletter, from Kletter Law)
* Always ignored my first few message inquiries and only responded after subsequent attempts days apart.
* Asked about electric car charging in garage, give an estimated cost of $400 and refused to give how he got the estimate. He falsely and unfriendly assumed I don’t want to pay for charging
* Complained to the landlord regarding the garage noise issue and he just acknowledged with a single cold sentence.
* Request for maintenance on dishwasher, team came once and said to order for parts and no follow up afterwards.
* Quoted $900 to $1600 deductions from security deposits for what should have been considered normal wear and tear for a  few patched drilled holes.
* Sid the leasing agent was nice and courteous when helping us moving in but the landlord Cary, who handles any issue/inquiry during the lease, is not a nice person.
* In addition, beware as this landlord did not return the security deposit within 21 days after move-out and only mail the check one day late when a demand letter is sent.

Extremely poor noise insulation. I constantly have panic attacks for the past year and didn’t have good sleep on most nights. These are some of the example instances of noise I observed.
* People shouting on the street at 11 PM
* Garage downstairs vibrating the floor at 12 PM when neighbors get home
* The unit is on the path of airplane runways, and thus airplanes rumbles all day until 2 AM
* Car speeding with loud engine at 2 AM that awaken me
* Trash pickup truck beeping and making loud noise at 6 AM
* Cars alarm beeping every now and then
* Will hear any non-electric car passing by
* Washer regular draining cycle shake the whole house like it might fall apart.
* Hear every movement from neighbors next door despite them walking just normally.
* Hear cabinet slamming from next door despite they’re being closed normally.
* Music from neighbors downstairs and one-unit-away vibrates the floors and shared walls.
* Hear ravens fighting from the ceiling/rooftop

Other cons:
* Moldy smell that will not go away despite a dehumidifier and air purifiers running every day for the past year.
* It’s super cold most of the times as the thermal insulation is bad
* Strong jet fuel smell on non-windy days (about 4 weeks in total last year)
* Bathroom tap water occasionally flows reddish brown water every month. It happens during the first few minutes of turning on the tap and becomes clear afterwards.
* Marijuana smell that leaks through the building seams despite all windows closed
* 7-eleven truck unloading engine noise for an hour every 3 days
reviews.ownerResponse: This person is not reviewing Kletter Law, he has complaints about the noise level in an apartment he rented, which is an opinion he is entitled to, however the location of this review for this business is inappropriate.

Gabriela handled my case from start to finish with exceptional professionalism and dedication. She guided me through every step, kept me informed at all times, and fought hard on my behalf. Thanks to her expertise and advocacy, my case was rejected by the prosecution, I did not have to go to court, no criminal charges were filed against me, and my driver’s license was fully reinstated with no suspension.

What truly sets Gabriela apart is how accessible and responsive she is. She genuinely cares about her clients and goes above and beyond to make sure nothing is overlooked. Her hard work, attention to detail, and commitment made all the difference in my case, and I am extremely grateful for the outcome.

If you are facing a DUI or any legal matter and want an attorney who is compassionate, responsive, and highly effective, Gabriela is absolutely the one to call. I trusted her completely, and she delivered outstanding results.

I recently had the opportunity to work with David Lowe on a workers’ compensation matter, and I want to formally express my appreciation for the outstanding service he provided.

What stands out most is his humility and respect. He treats his clients with dignity and ensures they feel both valued and understood. His approach is straightforward and client-centered. Sincerely,

David Lundell

TLDR: HIGHLY HIGHLY RECOMMEND THE BALLOUT TEAM!

It's been a long way coming! I've had my very first consultation with Mr Ballout back in 2018 about my J-1 visa. It was a long process, but worth the wait, the consultation, the services provided. They are excellent, extremely polite, very helpful and allover, very pleasant to interact with. Whenever I came to the office, the atmosphere was very warm and welcoming.

The Ballout Office was always available for calls almost at any time, no matter from where, no matter when, the team is very responsive! They always gave me a reminder call the day before appointments, as well as sent out a reminder email, very considerate.

Mr Ballout is super knowledgeable with all the legal circumstances and is extremely up-to-date with the latest laws/rules etc. and the team helped me navigate through the whole process of I-485 (Adjustment of Status), I-765 (Employment Authorization Document), I-131 (Travel/Advance Parole) and I-130 (Petition for Immediate Alien Relative). They helped to put together the whole package stress-free and effortlessly.

Updates:
2024: They've navigated my GC extension process with me together, walked me through it, updated me with everything paperwork, it got approved super quickly.

2026: And now even after being together for a whopping 8yrs together in my journey, we're starting the citizenship application process in 2026.

If I were to do this again, I'd definitely go with him and his teams of extremely competent employees over and over again.

I am writing to express my strong recommendation for Ballout Law and their exceptional legal team. Before contacting their office, two immigration attorneys informed me that I had NO chance of becoming a U.S. citizen. I had a run-in with the law when I was younger and made mistakes that made the process extremely difficult. With a record on file, the path to citizenship seemed nearly impossible.

However, Ballout Law conducted a thorough and honest evaluation of my case and assured me that I still had a viable path forward. Through their expertise, professionalism, and dedication, my application was approved, and I am now a United States citizen.

I would also like to recognize the entire staff at Ballout Law for their outstanding customer service. They were consistently professional, attentive, and supportive, and they went above and beyond to ensure I was informed and comfortable throughout the process.

I also want to share this message: for anyone who has had a run-in with the law in the past, it is still possible to become a United States citizen. If you stay on the right path, stay out of trouble, and continue being a good and responsible person, there is hope. Ballout Law is proof that the right representation can make all the difference.

I highly recommend Ballout Law to anyone seeking knowledgeable and reliable immigration representation.

You successfully handled my own citizenship case so well, which is why we didn't hesitate to entrust you with my wife's critical immigration cases, and we couldn't be more grateful.

The path from the K1 visa to the Green Card and then finally to U.S. Citizenship is a massive, complicated process. It could've been a total headache! But, because of your expertise and guidance, the whole thing felt super smooth and totally manageable. During this period, we had a kid who is 5 years now and you have been there supporting us all the way.

We really have to mention the incredible effort and due diligence you all put in. You were there every step of the way, patiently answering our questions and truly ensuring it was a smooth sail. The paperwork for both the Green Card renewal and citizenship interviews was so perfect that we got approved in under 10 minutes with minimal questions. That's how good your team is!

This whole smooth process let us focus on building our life together, instead of constantly worrying about the legal details. Knowing we could rely on you after your excellent work on my own case, and seeing my wife successfully complete her path (K-1 to Green Card to Citizenship!), gives our family incredible peace of mind. These are huge, life-changing milestones, and we owe this outcome to your skill and commitment.
We continue to advocate for your services and tell everyone to use Ballout Law's services without a second thought. Thanks again to the entire firm for everything you did for our family!

My name is Naresh. I reached out to Ballout and team when having problems with my immigration. Long story short, I've applied for Citizenship/Naturalization process. For some reason, USCIS holded my application for 6years. When called them,  they wouldn't give any info. I got stress about this whole process of dealing with Immigration and reached out to Ballout and team. We had a consultation session with Ballout initially. He asked me all the questions and I answered them. He truly believes that there is no reason for Immigration to hold my application for such a long time. He said he would definitely help me out and told about his fee. Initially I thought it was expensive. But I don't want to deal with other law firms which offer less fee, cause I feel it is very important to get it done by first time without taking any chance. So, I agreed to his fee. He and his team started working on my case, requested all the documents needed and I prepared them as they requested. Before the interview date Ballout reached me and had a Q&A session about the interview. Finally,  he came to interview with me to USCIS, I was expecting that interview process will be ruthless and will take many hours, but unexpectedly the process seem very easy and simple and they agreed to approve my application finally. Then,  I realized, that it's worth every penny that I paid for.

I would really thank Ballout and team whole heartedly, for getting me over this case.

Also, wish everyone Goodluck their case.

reviews.text: My green card application was rejected by USCIS due to their careless judgment, and it dragged on for seven years without any progress. Throughout these seven years, I continuously received rejection letters and kept appealing, but the case hardly progressed. During this period, we tried to find a more professional and proactive lawyer to help us with my case, but few law firms dared to take over my case until I found the Haitham Law Firm. Unlike most law firms that only handle routine application procedures and simple tasks like filling out forms, Haitham has decades of experience in handling complicated immigration application cases. On the first day we met with Haitham, he spent only half an hour to clearly outline the timeline of my seven-year immigration application and confidently presented several feasible solutions to us, which was something none of the previous lawyers I consulted could do. Within less than a month of deciding to hire Haitham for our WOM litigation, his law firm prepared the lawsuit and submitted it to the court, and two months later, we received the green card! Every step of the process aligned with what he predicted during our first meeting. Compared to our past troublesome experience, I can't imagine it could goes so smoothy today! Haitham is one of the few lawyers I've met in these seven years who dares to stand up for clients and fight against government agencies. If your case is also swamped in a long-standing situation without any progress, I strongly suggest you to contact Haitham Ballout Law Firm. They excel at resolving such complicated cases.

reviews.text:
My case was messy, involving several states because the other party and I had both moved from California where the original support order had been  issued.  I spoke to several different law offices and attorneys as I was trying to determine how best to proceed in each state.  Most people basically told me to give up because it would be too expensive to hire an attorney and I might not win, so it would not be worth it.  Or they told me to represent myself.  A few were confused and even gave me what turned out to be incorrect info or advice.

Flora Garcia-Sepulveda truly stood out as the best. First of all, she offered to talk to me for 30 minutes, which I could afford.  To be efficient with her time, I provided her with a written summary of my case.  She immediately understood my case and in just a few minutes she clearly and concisely told me what to do and what to expect.  She could have taken on my case and made more money, but she was honest and direct and said that although we could file with the court in California, it would not help me in the end, and she explained to me the reasons.  Flora listened closely, saw a path forward, and explained to me in terms I could understand.  She affirmed what I had learned on my own and corrected parts I had wrong.  I left the conversation feeling more confident in my DIY approach to my case.

A couple of weeks before my hearing, I reached out to schedule another 30 minutes with Flora.   My case had some new developments. On short notice, she fitted me into her full schedule, meeting with me at the end of the day. Once again, she listened closely, understood the nuances of the situation immediately, and then redirected me to a better course of action than what I had come up with.  She gave me specific steps that I could do myself to strengthen my case. I left our second conversation feeling empowered  and clear on my next steps to take.  Following her advice, I reflected and made some strategic decisions.

In the end I won, not 100% but a decent outcome. Against the odds. It was uphill all the way. I did a ton of research on my own.  I hired a good local attorney for the hearing.  I stood my ground with confidence.  My conversations with Flora greatly improved the entire process for me.

The outcome is truly life changing for me and my child. I am so grateful to Flora for her part in this process  --- not just because I won, but also because she helped to restore my agency and my dignity as I worked through this difficult process step by step.  I cannot recommend Flora highly enough.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your experience in such detail — your words truly mean a lot to us. It takes immense strength to navigate a complex, multi-state case on your own, and we’re honored that we could play a part in helping you feel empowered and supported along the way. Our goal is always to provide clarity, honesty, and guidance — whether that means taking on a case or equipping someone to confidently move forward on their own.

We're so glad to hear that your outcome was life-changing for you and your child. Wishing you both continued peace and strength ahead.
